title: Mended Minecraft
description:
Minecraft but slightly improved, credits to the creators of:
-Sodium
-Lithium
-Phosphor
-Iris Shaders
-No Chat Reports
And to moddermore.net
body:
All the credits are to the creators of the featured mods! (I made none of them.)

This Minecraft modpack is for the people who want to make Minecraft just slightly better, without downsides.

This modpack adds mods to improve your fps, enable you to use shaders, and makes it so you can't be reported in the chat.

(not everything is guaranteed to work and it does not works everywhere or on every divice)
(Some mods may not be allowed on every server, speedrun, etc.)

Credits to the creators of:
-Sodium
-Lithium
-Phosphor
-Iris Shaders
-No Chat Reports
